text:
We Meet Again (, Saikai) is the 26 th volume of the Hunter × Hunter manga series. It was released by Shueisha on October 3 rd , 2008 in Japan and by Viz Media on January 5 th , 2010 in English.

Chapters

271. Separation (, Bundan)
272. Error (, Gosan)
273. We Meet Again (, Saikai)
274. Solution (, Kaidō)
275. Promise (, Yakusoku)
276. Missileman (, Misairuman)
277. Insult (, Bujoku)
278. Destruction (, Hakai)
279. Escape (, Dasshutsu)
280. Direct Hit (, Chokugeki)

Summary

As Zeno uses Dragon Head to transport Netero and the King away from the palace, Shoot fearlessly fights Menthuthuyoupi, with each trying to keep the other away from the King. Making use of God's Accomplice, Knuckle feels powerless as he watches Shoot endure Youpi's strikes. Welfin and Bloster confront Ikalgo (disguised as Flutter), and after he accidentally uses Leol's old name, the two Chimera Ants realize something is wrong.

Shoot begins to reach his limit against Youpi, but Knuckle suddenly reveals himself and challenges the Royal Guard. In the throne room, Shaiapouf introduces himself to Morel and uses Spiritual Message to analyze the Hunter, eventually wrapping himself up in a cocoon. As Ikalgo heads to the basement to look for Palm, Gon and Killua find Neferpitou using Doctor Blythe to heal Komugi, but while Killua understands that Pitou is protecting the girl, Gon can only see her being hurt and envisions the torture that was inflicted upon Kite.

Pitou begs Gon to let them heal Komugi, causing him to fly into a rage as he nearly decides to kill the Royal Guard. However, Killua quickly reminds him that they need Pitou in order to heal Kite. Gon finally agrees to wait one hour for Pitou to heal Komugi, ordering them to follow him to Peijin and heal Kite once the hour has passed. Elsewhere, Knuckle taunts Youpi and gets the Royal Guard to chase after him as Meleoron meets up with Killua. After Youpi gives up chasing Knuckle and passes by the wounded Shoot, Knuckle is unable to take Shoot to take safety, declaring that he has to get revenge for Youpi's insult, which Shoot tearfully urges him to do.

With Morel left unsure by Pouf's plot, an enraged Youpi attacks Knuckle and destroys the base of the central tower in the process, revealing to Knuckle that too much anger causes the Royal Guard to unleash an explosion. Outside the palace, Cheetu confronts Zeno but is quickly killed by Silva, with the two Zoldycks riding off on a dragon. As Pouf slowly escapes Morel's Smoky Jail, Ikalgo continues his search for Palm and as he worries that she may be dead, he is attacked by Bloster and Flutter's corpse is destroyed. Youpi uses his fake rage against Knuckle, drawing the Hunter in and leaving him defenseless as he prepares to kill him with a single punch. But high above in the sky, making use of God's Accomplice, Killua unleashes Thunderbolt on Youpi, immobilizing the Royal Guard as Knuckle punches him hard in the face.
